item.title: Web scraping with go and go-colly
item.description: In this post, I will show you how to use Go and colly for web scraping by trying to scrape the frontpage of a popular Nigerian forum called Nairaland. Web Scraping Web scraping is a form of data extraction that basically extracts data from websites. A web scraper is usually a bot that uses the HTTP protocol to access websites, extract HTML elements from them and use the data for various purposes.

item.title: About
item.description: Hello, my name is Damilola Dolor and I am a software developer based in Lagos Nigeria. I am currently not employed 😭 and open to opportunities both remote and onsite 😂. Being self-taught for the most part, I have been able to gather skills required for web development by partcipating in hackathons, virtual internships and building projects - some of which are listed in my portfolio. I mostly work with Javascript, Python and Go, and I’m open to learning relevant skills and using the best tools to solve a problem.

item.title: Contact me
item.description: You can reach me through any the following channels: Email Twitter Github

item.title: Portfolio
item.description: Personal Projects Here’s a list of some projects I’ve been able to build while learning to code: A mini forum A forum site where users can create posts, comment on a post, like posts etc. This was built using Go and Gin framework, backed by MongoDB. View source code An image sharing platform An image sharing site, kind of like a lazy clone of imgur.
